preferred_translation: with the six fields of experience as condition, contact
definition: Forward-link line connecting saḷāyatana and phassa.
notes: Use this record for the full line when the dependent-arising chain itself is in view. It keeps the formula aligned with the repository's distinction between the sixfold experiential fields and the contact event that follows. The OSF glossary supports this coordinated inheritance from saḷāyatana and phassa in the formula line.

context_rules.rendering: with the six fields of experience as condition, contact

context_rules.context: When a controlled alternate for saḷāyatana is already in use
context_rules.rendering: with the six sense fields as condition, contact
context_rules.notes: Use only when the surrounding frame already governs saḷāyatana that way.

example_phrases.translation: with the six fields of experience as condition, contact

authority_basis.scope: Supports coordinated inheritance from saḷāyatana and phassa in the formula line.

translation_policy.default_scope: Use as the standard line linking saḷāyatana and phassa in the forward chain.
translation_policy.when_not_to_apply: Do not let phassa drift into feeling or sensation language in this formula slot.
translation_policy.drift_risk: Prevents confusion between contact and what follows from contact.
